notes: v1.14.56 - ENTRY SCREEN MASTER PLAN, Phase 2: ENTRY BUTTON -> PURPLE GLASS BAR (replaces the accreted GATEWAY ring-port). Scope-locked to the button; the live globe packet mesh (#pe-mesh + its IIFE), wordmark, taglines, HOME, and the hold/enter handler+warp are UNTOUCHED (master-checked: mesh packets still animating after the swap). The button is now a compact PURPLE GLASS BAR pinned near the bottom, matching the app's DEPLOY-tile material: frosted glass (backdrop-filter blur(16px) saturate(1.2)), radial purple tint + dark linear base, inset top-sheen + outer drop-shadow, 1px hairline border, 22px radius; purple #8a4bff L-CORNER BRACKETS; 'HOLD TO ENTER' DOUBLED (~clamp 20-28px) in Chakra Petch, purple, soft glow (the JS swaps it to OPENING/ENTERING during charge). HOLD-CHARGE reuses the EXISTING value with NO parallel timer: draw() now publishes the charge (0..1) to the CSS var --pe-c on #pe-stage, and the bar's glow-swell (opacity:calc(var(--pe-c)*0.85)) + bracket-brighten (opacity:calc(0.5+var(--pe-c)*0.5)) ride it; release cancels; charge-complete fires the existing warp into HOME (verified boot->app). REGRESSION GUARD (FIX-1 pattern reapplied): all bar visual children (label, brackets, glow, the hidden SVG-hook stash) are pointer-events:none so a real touch lands on #pe-stage (which has touch-action:none) and iOS can't scroll-cancel the hold - re-verified document.elementFromPoint(center)===DIV#pe-stage. The old hex SVG hooks (#pe-hole/#pe-portal/#pe-seams/#pe-rim) are kept hidden in a .pe-stash so draw() keeps running without error; the GATEWAY pe-gw-* layers were fully removed (0 leftover). Bar has no idle animation -> reduced-motion inherently static (charge glow is user-driven). Gates: node --check 3/3, main <style> braces 2655/2655, four stamps lockstep v1.14.56, dct/sw CRLF + version.json LF, tap target ~64px (>=56), zero overflow (bar max-width 90vw), scoped #boot/#pe-. backdrop-filter has a real mobile cost - John should eyeball FPS on device. PHASE STATUS: Phase 0 (aisle bg image) = John runs (image-gen); Phase 1 (bake aisle behind globe) = BLOCKED on that asset; Phase 3 (cost-assess live city panel / rack lighting) = reported separately, not built; Phase 4 = conditional on Phase 3 + John's pick. STILL PENDING from v1.14.49: the ?cal=1 mesh-node calibration pass (now reachable only via ?cal=1).
